  "findings": [
    "Welding performed without qualified Welding Procedure Specification (WPS) parameters."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all welding operations associated with the non-compliant procedures.",
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR).",
    "Require the contractor to submit qualified WPS and Welder Performance Qualification Records (WPQR).",
    "Perform non-destructive testing (NDT) on all welds produced under the unqualified parameters to determine if they must be rejected and re-welded."
  ],
  "rationale": "AWS D1.1 requires all structural welding to be performed in accordance with qualified Welding Procedure Specifications (WPS). Welding without qualified parameters compromises the structural integrity of the welds, failing the inspection stage.",

    "AWS D1.1 Section 4 (Qualification)",
    "AWS D1.1 Section 5 (Fabrication)"
  ]
